ai-w11-t1.answer: AI generates ER from requirements. Validate entities, PKs, FKs, and naming match your Flyway migrations.
ai-w11-t1.realWorld: Banking ER: Account, Transaction — AI may miss double-entry constraints.

ai-w11-t2.answer: Schema design: normalize, choose types, index strategy, soft delete columns. AI drafts; DBA instincts verify.
ai-w11-t2.realWorld: BIGSERIAL id, TIMESTAMPTZ created_at, VARCHAR(255) with known max — explicit types.

ai-w11-t3.answer: Complex SQL: JOINs, subqueries, CTEs, window functions. Run on sample data; AI often wrong on dialect.
ai-w11-t3.realWorld: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dept) — verify on Postgres vs MySQL.

ai-w11-t4.answer: EXPLAIN ANALYZE shows actual timings. Paste to AI with query; discuss index vs rewrite.
ai-w11-t4.realWorld: Seq scan 2M rows → index on filter column or partition table.

ai-w11-t5.answer: Index columns in WHERE, JOIN, ORDER BY — not every column. Too many indexes slow writes.
ai-w11-t5.realWorld: Composite index (user_id, created_at) for user's recent orders query.

ai-w11-t6.answer: Performance: connection pool sizing, N+1 queries, missing indexes, SELECT *. AI flags patterns in logs.
ai-w11-t6.realWorld: Hibernate statistics or query count in test reveals N+1.

ai-w11-t7.answer: MongoDB: aggregation pipelines, $match, $group, $lookup. AI drafts; test in mongosh.
ai-w11-t7.realWorld: Analytics: orders per day — $group by $dateToString on createdAt.

ai-w11-t8.answer: Hibernate: LazyInitializationException, N+1, wrong fetch type. Paste entity + error; fix fetch join or @Transactional.
ai-w11-t8.realWorld: @OneToMany fetch LAZY + session closed = classic bug — join fetch in query.

ai-w11-t9.answer: AI drafts data dictionary: table purpose, column meaning, constraints. Keep synced with migrations.
ai-w11-t9.realWorld: Onboarding doc: what each table stores — reduces tribal knowledge.

ai-w11-t10.answer: Flyway/Liquibase migrations versioned in git. AI writes V2__add_column.sql; you test rollback strategy.
ai-w11-t10.realWorld: Never edit applied migration — add new version file instead.
